ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "cluster_type" TEXT /* Type of the cluster (e.g., standalone, YARN, Mesos) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cluster was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the cluster (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "spark_version" TEXT /* Version of Spark installed on the cluster */,
  "hadoop_version" TEXT /* Version of Hadoop installed on the cluster */,
  "config_file" TEXT /* Path to the configuration file for the cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the node belongs to */,
  "node_type" TEXT /* Type of the node (e.g., master, worker) */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the node */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the node (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "node_role" TEXT /* Role of the node in the cluster (e.g., driver, executor) */,
  "cpu_architecture" TEXT /* CPU architecture of the node (e.g., x86_64, aarch64) */,
  "ram" INTEGER /* Amount of RAM in the node in GB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port configuration */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the port belongs to */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Port number */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., Web UI, REST API, Job Submission, Scheduler) */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the default port */,
  "configuration_setting" TEXT /* Configuration setting for the port */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "ssl_enabled" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if SSL is enabled for the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ports_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the job was submitted to */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of the job (e.g., batch, streaming) */,
  "submitted_by" TEXT /* User who submitted the job */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job ended */,
  "output_location" TEXT /* Location of the job output */,
  "job_config" TEXT /* Job configuration (e.g., spark-submit options) */,
  "dependencies" TEXT /* List of dependencies required by the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "executors" (
  "executor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each executor */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job the executor belongs to */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the executor is running on */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the executor started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the executor ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the executor (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the executor in MB */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage of the executor as a percentage */,
  "executor_logs" TEXT /* Executor logs (e.g., stdout, stderr) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("executor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executors_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_executors_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cluster or node */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster being accessed */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node being accessed (if applicable) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify, delete) */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_logs_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cluster_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., cpu_usage, memory_usage, network_traffic) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cluster_metrics_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., cpu_usage, memory_usage, network_traffic) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster the alert is related to */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node the alert is related to (if applicable) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., job_failure, resource_exhaustion) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Alert message */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., acknowledged, unresolved) */,
  "acknowledged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was acknowledged */,
  "acknowledged_by" TEXT /* User who acknowledged the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of the documentation (e.g., user_guide, faq, troubleshooting) */,
  "doc_title" TEXT /* Title of the documentation */,
  "doc_content" TEXT /* Content of the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the documentation (e.g., cluster_management, job_submission) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert related to the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., email, sms) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cluster related to the audit log */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node related to the audit log (if applicable) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., create_cluster, delete_cluster) */,
  "event_message" TEXT /* Event message */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)
